parsed_output.justification: Tyler and Clint have mutually exclusive claims: Tyler claims to be the Robber who robbed Clint and became the Insomniac, while Clint claims he was the Insomniac and remained so at the end of the night. This direct contradiction means at least one of them is lying. Furthermore, both Tyler and Clint aggressively coordinate their accusations against Erin, which is a common strategy for a Werewolf team to deflect suspicion. Tyler's more elaborate claim and aggressive initiation of the accusations make him a highly likely candidate for the Werewolf.
